title: ACTION OF PREVOSTS REAGENT ON ∆ 9:10-OCTALIN
author: SUKH DEV
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The action of silver benzoate-iodine complex on ∆ 9:10 -octalin has yielded 9-oxy-∆ 4- octalin instead of the expected 9 : 10-glycol.
steps_raw: The action of silver benzoate-iodine complex on ∆ 9:10 -octalin has yielded 9-oxy-∆ 4- octalin instead of the expected 9 : 10-glycol.
